## Checklist

- [ ] For provider resource changes, I updated the provider's `unsupported_resources.json` with any evidence-backed unsupported resources discovered, or confirmed no metadata update is needed.
- [ ] I ran the relevant validation for this change.

See [docs/unsupported-resources.md](https://github.com/chenrui333/terraformer/blob/main/docs/unsupported-resources.md) for the unsupported resource metadata convention.
